== Notes for [[Item:Q57297|Q57297]] ==

http://gw5.geneanet.org/sanchiz?lang=en;pz=tomas;nz=sanchez+garza;ocz=0;p=pedro;n=navarra

--------------------

Juan NAVARRO, a Basque from (Navarre whose family originally came from Portugal), went to Santo Domingo in 1514. He was in Cuba in 1519, went to Mexico with Narvaez, and later joined Hernan Cortes.

________

Full name is Pedro de Navarra Navarro. His paternal surname is "Navarro," which was granted to his family's line by King Pedro I of Portugal to Pedro de Navarra's great-grandfather Moshe (Todros) Navarro aka Moshe Gedaliah ben Don Gedalya the elderst ibn Yahya.

Source: "Divrei ha-Yamim le-Bnei Yahya,( דברי הימים לבני יחייא )", by Eliakim Carmoly, Printed in Frankfort am Main/Rodelheim, Published by: Isak Kaufman, 1850.

"De Navarra" indicates place of residence birth or both, i.e., "Pedro from Navarra Navarro."

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
